$comment: Fail-closed allow-list for the issue-183 distributed proof (#289). Every field a workflow_dispatch caller could otherwise supply as free text (queue URL, TLS hostname, TLS fingerprint) is resolved from this file by environment_id only. Changing this file requires a reviewed PR (see CODEOWNERS) — it must never be reconstructed from workflow inputs.

staging.description: Non-production distributed-queue smoke endpoint for issue-183 proof runs.
staging.revocation_procedure: Rotate SIMPLICIO_REMOTE_QUEUE_TOKEN in the distributed-staging GitHub Environment and bump reviewed_at after re-validating the pins.
